mapper.select:
SELECT nr.id, nr.record_no, nr.customer_id, nr.item_id, nr.nurse_name, nr.nursing_time, nr.result, nr.remark, nr.create_time, nr.update_time, c.name AS customer_name, ni.item_name AS item_name, ni.description AS description FROM nursing_record nr LEFT JOIN customer c ON nr.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN nursing_item ni ON nr.item_id = ni.id AND ni.deleted = 0 WHERE nr.deleted = 0
AND (nr.record_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ni.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY nr.create_time DESC
